docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-31-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2022 - JUDGMENT. (MATTER PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON MAY 31, 2022)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT STEINER, ANDREA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PEARSON, REBECCA PLAINTIFF DID NOT SHOW THAT SHE GAVE NOTICE UNDER THE CONTRACT TO DEFENDANT OF THE EXPENSES SUED FOR, WHICH APPEAR TO BE OVER $300 EACH. DEFENDANT DID NOT PROVE DAMAGES ON HER CLAIM, AS SHE DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT SHE WOULD HAVE BEEN ABLE TO RENT THE PROPERTY FOR THE THREE WINTER MONTHS AT ISSUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $95) SERVED MAR-31-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEINER, ANDREA
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY PEARSON, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT STEINER, ANDREA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT STEINER, ANDREA

SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR MAY-31-2022 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - ANDREA STEINER (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NO MAIL RECEPTACLE - UNABLE TO FORWARD) AS TO DEFENDANT STEINER, ANDREA
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY STEINER, ANDREA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PEARSON, REBECCA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL(BY PLANTIFF)**GRANTED** -THIS REQUEST IS UNTIMELY, HOWEVER THIS COURT GRANTS THE CONTINUANCE. VENUE WILL BE ADDRESSED AT THE HEARING
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT STEINER, ANDREA
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT STEINER, ANDREA
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(REBECCA PEARSON)**GRANTED**
REMARK:PLANTIFF'S DECLARATION/EXHIBITS 1-5 RECEIVED BY MAIL 5/26/22- FORWARD TO DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2022 BY DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF REBECCA PEARSON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ANDREA STEINER IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PARTIES AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE STIPULATION ON THEIR BEHALF. LISA VIGO, WITNESS, TESTIFIES ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO EXHIBITS WERE PRESENTED BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CHALLENGE OF VENUE NOTICE -SENT TO ALL PARTIES
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(ANDREA STEINER)**GRANTED**
REMARK:PLANTIFF'S DECLARATION/EXHIBITS RECD VIA DROP BOX 5/25/22- FORWARD TO DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2022 BY DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF REBECCA PEARSON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ANDREA STEINER IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PARTIES AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE STIPULATION ON THEIR BEHALF. LISA VIGO, WITNESS, TESTIFIES ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO EXHIBITS WERE PRESENTED BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STEINER, ANDREA PLAINTIFF DID NOT SHOW THAT SHE GAVE NOTICE UNDER THE CONTRACT TO DEFENDANT OF THE EXPENSES SUED FOR, WHICH APPEAR TO BE OVER $300 EACH. DEFENDANT DID NOT PROVE DAMAGES ON HER CLAIM, AS SHE DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT SHE WOULD HAVE BEEN ABLE TO RENT THE PROPERTY FOR THE THREE WINTER MONTHS AT ISSUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON MAY 31, 2022)
